name: Tailscale
description: Open Vibe Research and localhost app ports through a tailnet portal.
keywords: installed and logged in on this machine
Sign in with the local Tailscale CLI if tailnet URLs are not appearing.
Open Vibe Research from the Tailscale URL shown in startup output or port previews.
Use the Localhost Apps dock to publish eligible localhost-only ports with Tailscale Serve.

access.label: Tailnet portal
access.detail: Uses the local Tailscale CLI when available to show tailnet URLs and expose localhost-only ports with Tailscale Serve. Vibe Research does not store Tailscale credentials.

capabilities.name: VIBE_RESEARCH_BUILDING_GUIDES_DIR
capabilities.detail: Directory containing all generated building guides.

capabilities.detail: Environment variable referenced by Tailscale setup notes.

capabilities.detail: Environment variable referenced by Tailscale setup notes.

capabilities.name: tailscale
capabilities.detail: Shows whether the machine is logged into a tailnet.

variables.label: Tailscale CLI

steps.title: Connect Tailscale
steps.detail: Sign in with the local Tailscale CLI if tailnet URLs are not appearing.

steps.title: Use the portal
steps.detail: Open Vibe Research from the Tailscale URL shown in startup output or port previews.

steps.title: Expose local apps
steps.detail: Use the Localhost Apps dock to publish eligible localhost-only ports with Tailscale Serve.

agentGuide.summary: Use Tailscale when an agent needs to understand private remote access, tailnet URLs, or why a localhost app can be exposed safely through Tailscale Serve.
useCases: Check whether this Vibe Research instance has a tailnet URL.
Diagnose why a localhost-only app is not reachable from another device.
Explain to a human what Tailscale Serve setup is missing without asking for credentials unless login is required.

commands.label: Check local Tailscale status
commands.detail: Shows whether the machine is logged into a tailnet.

commands.label: List app ports
commands.detail: Use the current app port when known; browser UI usually exposes ports directly.

env.name: VIBE_RESEARCH_BUILDING_GUIDES_DIR
env.detail: Directory containing all generated building guides.
